description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical aluminum can with a deep blue background and a sleek, modern design. The front features bold, uppercase text and a stylized illustration of two dancing figures in suits, surrounded by small stars and geometric accents. The can displays a crossword-style arrangement of the word 'FRIZZÉ' on one side, with additional product information and a barcode on the reverse. The top is silver with a standard pull tab opening. The surface appears smooth and slightly reflective, typical of beverage cans. The overall look is vibrant and contemporary, with a focus on blue tones and dynamic graphics.
description: A tall blue aluminum can with bold text, dancing figures, and crossword-style graphics, finished with a smooth, slightly reflective surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing bold 'BLUE' text, dancing figures, and most of the main label graphics.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the crossword-style 'FRIZZÉ' text and partial main label.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the crossword 'FRIZZÉ' graphic and smaller product details.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the barcode, product information, and part of the dancing figure illustration.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a deep blue background with bold, modern typography and stylized illustrations of dancing figures. The design incorporates geometric elements, stars, and a crossword-style text arrangement, creating a lively and contemporary visual appeal.
